name: Linguine with Scallops
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Olive Oil or cooking oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw scallops if frozen. Halve any large scallops and set aside.
2. Cook linguine according to package directions.
3. Meanwhile, heat margarine and oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add scallops and cook, stirring, for about 2 minutes or until opaque.
5. Remove scallops with a slotted spoon, leaving juices in the skillet.
6. Stir broth, white wine (or vermouth), and lemon juice into the skillet.
7. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until liquid is reduced to about 1 cup.
8. Stir in onion, parsley, capers, and dillweed. Simmer uncovered for 1 minute.
9. Add scallops and stir until just heated through.
10. Pour the sauce over the ingredients and toss gently.
